raw_calls.callee: function(e){if(!e||!e.options)throw eS("App Configuration Object");if(!e.name)throw eS("App Name");let{options:t}=e;for(let e of["projectId","apiKey","appId","messagingSenderId"])if(!t[e])throw eS(e);return{appName:e.name,projectId:t.projectId,apiKey:t.apiKey,appId:t.appId,senderId:t.messagingSenderId}}
